name: grace_full_lifecycle_clean_expiry
description: Warm day. Sensor opens at 13:00 (pause). Sensor closes at 13:10 (grace starts, 5-min grace). Sensor stays closed. Grace expires at 13:15 with all sensors closed → automation resumes cleanly. Classification cycle at 13:30 applies normally.
unsupported_reason: Integration-tier: grace timer lifecycle (grace_start/grace_end synthetic events) is driven by async_call_later timers in the coordinator's _handle_contact_sensor_change layer. The Tier-A harness executes the production AutomationEngine headlessly but does not wire the coordinator timer callbacks that set/clear _grace_active. The final assertion (classification_applied at 13:30 after clean grace expiry) fails because the engine's event log shows 'resumed' as the last state — the coordinator layer that clears grace state and re-enables classification application is not exercised. Deferred to Tier-B HeadlessTarry harness (#236 follow-on) which wires the full coordinator state-listener/timer layer.
notes: Tests the normal (clean) grace expiry path: pause → sensor closes → grace expires cleanly → classification resumes.
Gap 2 (grace expiry re-check) is pending in simulate.py, but the CLEAN expiry path already works:
- grace_end event clears grace_active; no sensors open; no re-pause.
- The next classification event applies normally since paused_by_door=False after resumed.
All assertions in this scenario are logic-track — no Gap 2 required for the clean path.
Contrast with grace_full_lifecycle_sensor_still_open.json which tests the re-pause path.

events.note: Hot afternoon. Outdoor too warm for nat vent.
Door opens. Nat vent ineligible (outdoor too warm). Automation pauses.
Door closes. All sensors closed → automation resumes, grace period begins (5 min).
Grace period marker: grace_active=True. Sensor stays closed through grace window.
Grace expires at 13:15. All sensors are still closed → clean expiry, no re-pause.
30-min classification cycle. Grace is gone, no sensors open — classification applies normally.

assertions.reason: Sensor opens with outdoor (88F) > indoor (76F) — nat vent ineligible. Automation pauses.
All sensors closed — automation resumes. Grace period begins.
Grace expired cleanly (sensors stayed closed). Classification cycle at 13:30 applies normally: warm day, cool mode, comfort_cool=74F.

verdict.summary: Grace period expires cleanly when sensors stay closed; classification resumes normally
verdict.observed_behavior: paused (13:00) → resumed (13:10) → grace expires cleanly (13:15) → classification_applied (13:30, 74F)
verdict.expected_behavior: When no sensor opens during the grace window, automation resumes without re-pause after grace expires
